title: 目的副詞子句 so that / in order that

formulas.formula: S + V + so that/in order that + S + can/will/may + V
formulas.zh: 主詞 + 動詞 + 為了讓/以便 + 主詞 + 能夠/將會/可能 + 動詞

formulas.formula: S + V + in order to V / so as to V (不定詞改寫)
formulas.zh: 主詞 + 動詞 + 為了/以便 + 不定詞（當主詞相同時使用）

explanation: 此句型用於表達動作的目的，分為兩種形式：(1)完整子句形式使用「so that/in order that」，後接帶助動詞的完整子句；(2)簡化形式使用「in order to/so as to」直接加不定詞。兩者在意義相同但結構不同。使用時機為需明確表達「為什麼做某事」。易混淆點是助動詞的選擇（can用現在，will用未來）及與結果副詞子句的區分。注意「so that」既可表目的也可表結果，需由上下文判斷。

examples.eng: She studies hard so that she can pass the entrance exam.
examples.chi: 她努力讀書，好讓她能通過升學考試。

examples.eng: They saved money in order that their children will have a better education.
examples.chi: 他們存錢，以便他們的孩子能接受更好的教育。

examples.eng: The teacher speaks slowly so as to help students understand the lesson.
examples.chi: 老師說話很慢，以便幫助學生理解課程。

examples.eng: Athletes train every day in order to achieve their goals and win competitions.
examples.chi: 運動員每天訓練，為了達成目標並贏得比賽。

extension.tip: 判斷時機：當句子表達「為了達成某個目的」時使用此句型。主詞相同時優先使用 in order to/so as to 簡化句子；主詞不同時必須用 so that/in order that 搭配助動詞。切勿混淆 so...that（如此...以至於）與 so that（為了）的用法。

examples.test: 正確：He left early so that he could catch the train. / He left early in order to catch the train.
examples.result: → 兩句都對，但主詞相同時用不定詞版本更簡潔

examples.test: 錯誤：He left early so that to catch the train. / He left early for to catch the train.
examples.result: → so that 後不能接不定詞，應改用 in order to；for to 為非文法式用法

examples.test: 對比：It was so difficult that he could not solve it. vs. He explained clearly so that students could understand.
examples.result: → 前者表結果（so...that），後者表目的（so that）

extension.note: 記住：so that = 為了讓別人；in order to = 為了讓自己（當主詞相同時最常使用）。

parts: more people can receive medical care.
exercises.sentence: The government built more hospitals so that more people can receive medical care.
exercises.translation: 政府建造了更多醫院，好讓更多人可以獲得醫療照護。

parts: She practiced her speech many times
deliver it confidently at the conference.
exercises.sentence: She practiced her speech many times in order to deliver it confidently at the conference.
exercises.translation: 她多次練習演講，為了在會議上自信地發表。

parts: their children will have better opportunities in the future.
exercises.sentence: Parents work hard in order that their children will have better opportunities in the future.
exercises.translation: 父母努力工作，以便他們的孩子將來能有更好的機會。

parts: to attract more customers and increase sales.
exercises.sentence: The company reduced prices in order to attract more customers and increase sales.
exercises.translation: 公司降價，為了吸引更多顧客並增加銷售量。

parts: they can send their children to university.
exercises.sentence: The parents save money so that they can send their children to university.
exercises.translation: 父母存錢為了能夠送孩子上大學。

exercises.sentence: The government built new roads in order that traffic congestion would decrease.
exercises.translation: 政府建造新道路以便交通擁堵會減少。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的選項完成句子，表達目的
mc_exercises.question_eng: He wakes up early every morning _______ he can catch the first bus to work.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。句子主詞「He」為單數，空格後接「he can catch」（含主詞與助動詞），必須用「so that + S + can/will + V」的結構。B 項 so as to 和 C 項 in order to 後接不定詞，且不需要主詞。D 項 because 表原因而非目的，語意不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的目的副詞子句形式，主詞相同
mc_exercises.question_eng: The company invested heavily in technology _______ improve their production efficiency.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。因為主詞相同（都是 company/they），可使用不定詞形式 so as to + V。A 項雖文法正確但不夠簡潔。B 項 in order that 後應用 can 而非 will。D 項「so that to V」為常見錯誤，so that 後必須接助動詞，不能直接接不定詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別目的子句與結果子句的差異，選擇適切表達
mc_exercises.question_eng: The government implemented stricter environmental policies _______ reduce air pollution in major cities.

options.text: so that to be able to

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。主詞相同（政府實施政策→為了減少污染），應改寫為 in order to 或 so as to 搭配不定詞，更簡潔有力。A 項 so that 後主詞應與前句一致。B 項改變了主詞，造成邏輯混亂。D 項「so that to be able to」混合了兩種句型，為錯誤用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句型判斷，考慮主詞變更與時態搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: They distributed free masks throughout the neighborhood _______ vulnerable populations would have access to protective equipment during the health crisis.

options.text: in order that they can provide

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。主詞變更（they → populations），目的子句有自己的主詞時，須用「in order that + S + would/can + V」的完整從句結構；空格後「vulnerable populations would have」符合此需求。A 項 in order to 和 B 項 so as to 皆為不定詞形，主詞必須相同。D 項改變了原句邏輯結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的目的子句形式，完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: He wakes up early every day _______ he can catch the first bus to work.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「so that」。此句表示目的（為了能趕上公車），需用「so that + S + can + V」的完整子句形式。B「so」是連接詞但不能引導目的子句；C「because」表原因而非目的；D「therefore」是副詞無法引導子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷目的子句中的助動詞選用是否正確
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher explained the grammar rule slowly in order that all students _______ understand it clearly.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是C「can」。「in order that + S + can + V」表示現在或一般性的目的，should use 「can」表可能性。A「will」用於未來確定事件；B「would」和D「could」為過去或假設用法，不適合此正式教學情境。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我每天早起，以便準時上學。
translation_exercises.answer: I get up early every day so that I can arrive at school on time. / I get up early every day in order to arrive at school on time.
hints: 提示1：主詞相同時可用 so that + can 或 in order to 改寫
提示2：注意 so that 後接 can/will/may 搭配動詞，不能直接接不定詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學生認真讀書，為了在大學入學考試中取得好成績。
translation_exercises.answer: Students study hard so that they can get good grades in the university entrance exam. / Students study hard in order that they may achieve good results in the university entrance exam.
key_points: so that/in order that + S + can/may
get good grades in the entrance exam
hints: 提示1：主詞不同時需用 so that 或 in order that 搭配助動詞（can/may/will）
提示2：avoid 誤用『so that to get』—so that 後必須有助動詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師用了許多例子來解釋這個文法概念，以便學生能夠清楚地理解。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher used many examples to explain the grammar concept so that students could understand it clearly. / The teacher used many examples to explain the grammar concept in order that the students might understand clearly.
hints: 提示1：當表達過去情景或假設時，so that 後可用 could/might 替代 can/may
提示2：so that 子句表達目的時，助動詞選擇應符合主要子句時態

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 政府制定了新的環保政策，使得企業能夠減少碳排放，從而保護地球環境。
translation_exercises.answer: The government established new environmental policies so that enterprises could reduce carbon emissions in order to protect the Earth's environment. / The government established new environmental policies in order that companies might be able to decrease their carbon footprint and thus preserve the planetary ecosystem.
key_points: reduce carbon emissions / decrease carbon footprint
hints: 提示1：複雜句中可結合多個目的子句，第一個 so that 後用 could 表達可能性，第二個可用 in order to 或另一個 so that
提示2：注意主詞一致性—若企業與政府不同，需用 so that/in order that + S + could/might，不能簡化為不定詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我每天早起讀英文，以便能在學測中取得好成績。
translation_exercises.answer: I get up early every day so that I can get a good score on the college entrance exam.
key_points: so that + S + can + V 的完整結構
hints: 提示1：目的子句使用『so that + S + can + V』，其中 can 表示現在或一般情況下的能力/可能性
提示2：注意不要寫成 so I can...（缺少主詞），也不要用 will 代替 can

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師把重點寫在黑板上，為的是讓所有學生都能理解這個概念。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher writes the key points on the blackboard in order that all students can understand this concept.
key_points: in order that + S + can + V 的目的子句
hints: 提示1：『in order that』與『so that』意義相同，都表達目的，後面接帶助動詞 can 的完整子句
提示2：注意『in order that』較正式，在學術或書面英文中較常見；『so that』更口語化
